escalatedRisks.risk: 🟢🟢🟢 WF6 SUPPLY CRISIS RESOLVED — Kanto Denka + Central Glass suspended July 1 permanent shutdown on June 19 after securing Chinese tungsten export quota allocations.
escalatedRisks.status: RESOLVED (DOWNGRADED from CRITICAL to ELEVATED) — June 23, 2026 09:00 refresh。No new developments since June 19 resolution。Japanese producers continue WF6 production with Chinese tungsten powder quota。Previously expected 2,200 tons/year (~25% global capacity) gap AVOIDED。Physical supply cutoff removed。WF6 prices remain elevated (+200% YoY) but no longer facing physical supply disruption。Korean suppliers (SK Specialty/Foosung) 70-90% H2 2026 price increases may be revisited/reduced。
escalatedRisks.previousStatus: RESOLVED — June 19, 2026。Kanto Denka + Central Glass suspended July 1 permanent shutdown。

escalatedRisks.risk: 🔴 MLC NAND ending June 2026 — FINAL 7 DAYS。Last remaining structural NAND supply risk after WF6 resolution。Samsung Line 12 (Hwaseong) 2D NAND→HBM4 DRAM conversion confirmed。Global MLC capacity -41.7% in 2026。MLC spot tripled 300%+ since late 2025。PCIe4 TLC is the most direct beneficiary/victim of MLC exit。
escalatedRisks.status: SUSTAINED — June 23, 2026。Final 7 days of MLC NAND production。Samsung Line 12 ceased 2D NAND March 2026, physically converted to HBM4 DRAM。After WF6 crisis resolution (June 19), MLC exit becomes the sole remaining structural NAND supply risk — no longer part of a 'dual contraction' but still highly significant。PCIe4 TLC is the most direct beneficiary category — MLC主要用于企业级TLC替代场景,停产将直接推高PCIe4 TLC需求。Kioxia full 2D NAND exit by 2029。Micron curtailing MLC to existing commitments only。MLC spot prices tripled 300%+ since late 2025。
escalatedRisks.detail: Samsung Line 12 ceased 2D NAND production March 2026, physically converted to HBM4。MLC NAND final shipments June 2026 — only 7 days remain。With WF6 crisis resolved, MLC exit is now the sole structural NAND supply cut — the 'dual contraction' narrative is officially over。7 days to act before this supply source permanently offline。This is the final procurement window for any PCIe4 TLC purchases that depend on MLC supply availability。

escalatedRisks.detail: DDR3 4Gb spot $11.152 (+1.60%) acceleration from $10.976。This is the deepest and potentially most significant signal in the DRAM complex — DDR3 acceleration means buyers are being forced to the very bottom of the product stack, bidding up prices on the oldest, most commoditized DRAM products。This confirms the demand-pull (not supply-shock) nature of the current bull market。Three-generation synchronized acceleration unprecedented in DRAM history。

escalatedRisks.risk: Samsung PM1763 PCIe Gen6 SSD launched early 2026 (4TB-64TB, 28,400MB/s read, ~25W)。Medium-term technology transition risk for PCIe5 TLC products. Combined with WF6 resolution, this downgrades PCIe5 TLC procurement urgency. Monitoring for market adoption signals.
